title: aidia ochroleuca
intro: Aidia ochroleuca, also known as the yellow biriba or yellow mangosteen, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a tropical plant native to Southeast Asia, and its fruits are edible, but its leaves and roots are used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties. The leaves and roots of Aidia ochroleuca have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to their anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. Aidsia ochroleuca is often prepared as a decoction or infused in hot water to create a tea, or as a tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies in Southeast Asia.
